title: 2026-01-28 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 13.31
description: New daily signal for 2026-01-28: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 13.31/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2026-01-28, the score printed 13.31/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
